HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

REPLY IN FURTHER SUPPORT OF ITS MTN TO DISMISS AND QUASH FOR 1)INSUFFICIENT SERVICE OF PROCESS AND 2) LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION FILED BY DEFENDANT BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY, INC.
REPLY AND COUNTER ARGUMENT TO DEFTS MOTION TO DISMISS AND QUASH FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, DERRICK
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS AND QUASH FOR 1) INSUFFICIENT SERVICE OF PROCESS AND 2) LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS [CCP 177.5]- THE MOTION TO DISMISS AND QUASH IS GRANTED. THE SUMMONS IS QUASHED FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY, INC. AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED AS AGAINST THAT DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS SUPPORTED BY EVIDENCE SHOWING LACK OF SUFFICIENT CONTACTS WITH CALIFORNIA. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE OPPOSITION. EVEN IF IT IS CONSIDERED, HOWEVER, IT IS NOT SUPPORTED BY ANY EVIDENCE SO PLAINTIFF CANNOT CARRY HIS BURDEN OF PROVING A BASIS FOR JURISDICTION. EVEN IF PLAINTIFF'S ARGUMENTS WERE CONSIDERED, DESPITE THE ABSENCE OF ANY EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT THEM, PLAINTIFF RELIES ENTIRELY ON DEFENDANT HAVING SUBSIDIARIES DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA, WHICH IS INSUFFICIENT TO CONFER JURISDICTION. SANCTIONS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189

Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- DERRICK ANDERSON, TEL. NO. (510) 387-2465, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. BARBORA PULMANOVA OF MUSICK PEELER, TEL. NO. (213) 629-7612 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY INC.

RULING - A R G U E D; SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss And Quash For 1) Insufficient Service Of Process And 2) Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction; Request For Sanctions [CCP 177.5]- THE MOTION TO DISMISS AND QUASH IS GRANTED. THE SUMMONS IS QUASHED FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER BERKSHIRE HATHAWAY, INC. AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED AS AGAINST THAT DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS SUPPORTED BY EVIDENCE SHOWING LACK OF SUFFICIENT CONTACTS WITH CALIFORNIA. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION IS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE OPPOSITION. EVEN IF IT IS CONSIDERED, HOWEVER, IT IS NOT SUPPORTED BY ANY EVIDENCE SO PLAINTIFF CANNOT CARRY HIS BURDEN OF PROVING A BASIS FOR JURISDICTION. EVEN IF PLAINTIFF'S ARGUMENTS WERE CONSIDERED, DESPITE THE ABSENCE OF ANY EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT THEM, PLAINTIFF RELIES ENTIRELY ON DEFENDANT HAVING SUBSIDIARIES DOING BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA, WHICH IS INSUFFICIENT TO CONFER JURISDICTION. SANCTIONS DENIED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189
